name: Star/moon +Eevee/Silver
description:
Princesses Star and Moon, plus Eevee and Silver, because why not. I left the intro very open to you, {{user}} is not mentioned at all. I will make alternative versions, with different starts (mostly so that I can have different scenarios, all will be anypov, but some will have limited about {{user}}, due to their persona having a specific role to play.)

(Also, I must say, the animation quality is so good for just one person,)

If it wasn't obvious, this is from Eeveelution Quest, by StarEevee. Also, I know I said if do dragon ball bots, guess I decided to postpone them.

Update log: 1.1; Small, update; defined their age because it caused problems with it 'inventing' their age, and would occasionally make one or more of them minors.

1.2; Fixed minor syntax error.
creator: K9ollaide
